description:
Build the shared foundation that later UI tickets can reuse without duplicating logic.

This ticket owns the high-conflict files first so later tickets can run in cleaner lanes.

Scope:
- extract reusable action modules from the current monolithic `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/index.ts` command handling
- add `/bw:*` alias commands and `getArgumentCompletions(...)`
- create the dashboard entry/opening path so `/bw` opens the dashboard in beadwork-capable repos even when the session is still neutral
- preserve text fallback only for truly unavailable repos (`no-git`, `no-bw`, etc.)
- scaffold the dashboard/tab plumbing for later issue/worker/run panes

Primary file lane:
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/index.ts`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/command-aliases.ts`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/command-completions.ts`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/actions/{status,scope,issues,delegate,run,landing,workers,cleanup}.ts`
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/tui/dashboard.ts`

Acceptance criteria:
- `/bw` opens the dashboard instead of dumping text status whenever beadwork is available or active
- `/bw:*` aliases exist for the planned operator surface
- command and TUI paths can call shared action functions instead of duplicating business logic
- the dashboard shell can host later tabs without another large refactor
- tests cover neutral-session dashboard entry and alias/completion behavior

Parallel-safety note:
- finish this ticket before handing out the issue-explorer or worker-manager tickets; it is intentionally serialized to absorb the shared wiring churn.
title: Extract shared beadwork action/command scaffolding for the TUI
